text.title: microservices-design Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the microservices-design methodology end-to-end.

step.name: inventory-bounded-contexts
step.action: List bounded contexts; one service per context (typically).

step.name: assign-data-ownership
step.action: Each service owns its DB; document the per-service data store.
step.decision-gate: If two services need the same data, fold them OR add an API/event flow — never share a table.

step.name: design-transports
step.action: Pick HTTP, gRPC, or async per interaction.

step.name: wire-circuit-breakers
step.action: Wrap every inter-service call with a CircuitBreaker + timeout.

step.name: ship-observability
step.action: Add health/liveness/readiness + OpenTelemetry traces + structured logs.

step.name: version-apis
step.action: Add /v1 or proto package versioning; commit to N-day deprecation window.
